title: PainSense.ai - Animal Health Hackathon
description: An AI platform that uses computer vision and a two-stream deep neural network to objectively detect and score pain in dogs from short videos - built at Cornell's Animal Health Hackathon.

title: Melodease – Music Practice Tracking App
description: An adaptive music education platform blending personalized lessons, gamification, and AI-powered feedback to make practice consistent and engaging. Designed for Trinity College London curriculum.

title: Decentralized Framework for Content Creators
description: A blockchain ecosystem empowering creators with tokenized analytics, DAO-based governance, and a recommendation engine powered by big data clustering.

title: Demonstration of IoT Attacks
description: A hands-on security project that simulates real-world IoT vulnerabilities - including port scanning, brute force, MITM, and phishing - with evaluated countermeasures.
